title: AgentCo-op: Retrieval-Based Synthesis of Interoperable Multi-Agent Workflows
author: arXiv cs.AI
summary: AgentCo-op proposes a retrieval-based method for synthesizing interoperable multi-agent workflows, enabling different agents to collaborate by retrieving and adapting compatible workflow components. This approach streamlines the integration of heterogeneous agent systems, reducing development effort and improving cross-system cooperation.
